expectations.text: Output indicates an implementation plan artifact was produced
Output includes a research artifact with decisions/rationale
expectations.evidence: research.md includes Decision and Rationale content

expectations.text: research.md includes `Official docs reviewed` and `Version/context checked` entries for relevant technologies or standards from the spec constraints, and those sources inform the documented decisions
expectations.evidence: missing `Official docs reviewed` entries; missing `Version/context checked` entries; insufficient relevant technology coverage

expectations.text: Output includes a data model artifact
quickstart.md includes required headings (Prerequisites, Implement, Validate, Rollout/Operate) with concrete commands and expected outcomes
expectations.evidence: Required headings, commands, and expected outcomes present

expectations.text: Final report conforms exactly to the 5-section output contract and names /create-tasks or explicit blocker in Next command
expectations.evidence: All required section labels present in correct order with actionable next command
